raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Tens of millions of taxpayer dollars have been lost to fraudulent student accounts.",
    "Fictitious students, often created by bots, continue to siphon federal and state financial aid.",
    "Scammers stole over $10 million in federal aid in the past year alone.",
    "State financial aid fraud surged, with over $3 million disbursed to fake students.",
    "The percentage of fraudulent applicants has climbed from 20% in 2021 to 34% in early 2025.",
    "There have been calls for a comprehensive audit of the California Community Colleges Chancellor’s Office to determine protections against financial aid fraud.",
    "Existing technology used to detect and prevent fraud may not be effective."
  ]
}
```
